response.justification: While Bogdan possesses over 15 years of strong software engineering experience and technical leadership across various stacks (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang), his resume lacks the core domain expertise required for this specialized role. There is no evidence of experience building enterprise-scale experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, A/B testing frameworks, or managing growth metrics and telemetry infrastructure, which are the fundamental responsibilities of this Principal-level position.
strengths: Extensive 15+ years of software development experience across diverse tech stacks, including high-throughput microservices and system-level programming.
Demonstrated technical leadership and initiative, such as founding an open-source platform (GISCollective) and creating custom testing frameworks.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, which aligns with the AI-first aspect of the job description.
concerns: Complete lack of demonstrated experience designing or building experimentation, A/B testing, or feature-flagging platforms.
No explicit background in growth engineering, product telemetry, cross-surface funnels, or statistical data analysis.
Most recent roles are at the Senior/Staff level in smaller organizations, which may not meet the enterprise-scale architectural expectations of a Principal (IC6) role.
